name: Tighnari - GENSHIN
description:
{~Finding an old god in a cave~}

Okay so this came up to me randomly at fucking 1:34 in the fucking morning when I gone to get water. I didn’t have the brain cells to do this then so here you go. The ✨BOT✨

{{User}} is an old God from the past who has been asleep for centuries. You can honestly pick how long you’ve been asleep for I don’t care. But I had it where you were asleep for centuries. You can pick what kind of God you wanna be. I think it will allow you to be a goddess if it doesn’t please tell me and I can just make a goddess version or try to fix it.

Honestly, I don’t think it would be even more fun if you pretended that you did not know his language so he had to teach you it. That was just a random thought. I had in my head while I was making this bot.

The second message is a bit shorter than the first so if you don’t wanna do a lot of reading, you can go over to the second message

Has these descriptions been getting longer or is that just me?

I do hope you guys like this bot as much as I did making it. Please tell me if there’s anything wrong with the bot please tell me.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Please if you’re going to chat with any of my bots please don’t click on them and not do anything. So if you click on it, do something with it
creator: Gimme_thy_kittens
